entity.summary: Major U.S.-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange. HEI records Coinbase as an active exchange with event-backed history, including a 2023 SEC civil action and the 2025 dismissal of that action.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded row hei_unadded_0534 after event-backed review. Coinbase International Exchange, coinbaseadvanced, coinbaseexchange, and coinbaseinternational rows were not consumed because they may represent separate products, venues, or API IDs and need separate methodology review.

events.title: SEC filed civil action against Coinbase
events.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission filed a civil enforcement action against Coinbase in June 2023 involving exchange, broker, clearing, and staking-related claims.
events.notes: Major regulatory event; it did not mark Coinbase as closed or dead.

events.title: SEC filed to dismiss civil action against Coinbase
events.description: The SEC filed to dismiss its civil enforcement action against Coinbase in February 2025, ending the lawsuit that began in 2023.
events.notes: Resolution event recorded separately from the 2023 filing because it materially changed Coinbase's regulatory-history timeline.

events.title: Coinbase consolidated as active exchange entity
events.description: Coinbase is consolidated from the CoinPaprika candidate row into one active centralized exchange entity. Related Coinbase product/API rows remain unconsumed pending separate methodology review.

evidence.title: SEC 2023 Coinbase civil action press release
evidence.notes: SEC press release for the 2023 civil action.

evidence.title: Axios report on 2023 SEC action involving Coinbase
evidence.notes: Independent news report summarizing the 2023 SEC action involving Coinbase.

evidence.title: Reuters report on SEC filing to dismiss Coinbase case
evidence.notes: Reuters report on the SEC filing to dismiss its Coinbase case.

evidence.title: Politico report on planned Coinbase case dismissal
evidence.notes: Pre-dismissal report based on Coinbase's statement that SEC staff had agreed in principle to dismiss the case.

evidence.title: Coinbase official website
evidence.notes: Official website used to verify active identity.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange reference for Coinbase
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0534.
